message:
🌱 Add localai: Please support reranker API mission (#1094)

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,75 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "localai-2018-please-support-reranker-api",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "localai: Please support reranker API",
+    "description": "Please support reranker API. Requested by 5+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current localai deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your localai version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n localai -l app.kubernetes.io/name=localai\nhelm list -n localai 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working localai installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review localai configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant localai configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n localai -l app.kubernetes.io/name=localai\nkubectl get configmap -n localai -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=localai\n```\nNowadays, embedding + reranker is the SOTA solution to improve the accuracy of RAG system. We've already have the embedding API support in LocalAI, it would be a big step forward if we can support reranker API."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Please support reranker API",
+        "description": "This PR fixes #2018 . It was quite easy out to assemble as `rerankers` have a very good support for models out there.\n\nIt adds support for rerankers API, specifically implements the jina reranker APIs documented here: https://jina.ai/reranker/#apiform, behind the hoods, uses\n```yaml\nname: jina-reranker-v1-base-en\nbackend: rerankers\nparameters:\n  model: cross-encoder\n\nusage: |\n    You can test this model with curl like this:\n\n    curl http://localhost:8080/v1/rerank \\\n      -H \"Content-Type: application/json\" \\\n      -d '{\n      \"model\": \"jina-reranker-v1-base-en\",\n      \"query\": \"Organic skincare products for sensitive skin\",\n      \"documents\": [\n        \"Eco-friendly kitchenware for modern homes\",\n        \"Biodegradable cleaning supplies for eco-conscious consumers\",\n        \"Organic cotton baby clothes for sensitive skin\",\n        \"Natural organic skincare range for sen\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n localai -l app.kubernetes.io/name=localai\nkubectl get events -n localai --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"Please support reranker API\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "This PR fixes #2018 . It was quite easy out to assemble as `rerankers` have a very good support for models out there.\n\nIt adds support for rerankers API, specifically implements the jina reranker APIs documented here: https://jina.ai/reranker/#apiform, behind the hoods, uses https://github.com/AnswerDotAI/rerankers for calculations.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "name: jina-reranker-v1-base-en\nbackend: rerankers\nparameters:\n  model: cross-encoder\n\nusage: |\n    You can test this model with curl like this:\n\n    curl http://localhost:8080/v1/rerank \\\n      -H \"Content-Type: application/json\" \\\n      -d '{\n      \"model\": \"jina-reranker-v1-base-en\",\n      \"query\": \"Organic skincare products for sensitive skin\",\n      \"documents\": [\n        \"Eco-friendly kitchenware for modern homes\",\n        \"Biodegradable cleaning supplies for eco-conscious consumers\",\n        \"Organic cotton baby clothes for sensitive skin\",\n        \"Natural organic skincare range for sensitive skin\",\n        \"Tech gadgets for smart homes: 2024 edition\",\n        \"Sustainable gardening tools and compost solutions\",\n        \"Sensitive skin-friendly facial cleansers and toners\",\n        "
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
